channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Airbus makes fresh pitch after Biman-Boeing deal
item.description:
Importance: 73.7 | Covered by: 7 feeds | Reputation: 7.4

Matched titles:
- Airbus submits fresh 10-jet offer to Biman
- Airbus submits fresh 10-jet offer to Biman
- Airbus submits fresh 10-aircraft proposal to Biman
- Airbus submits fresh 10-jet offer to Biman
- Airbus offers 10 aircraft to Biman after Boeing deal
- Airbus submits fresh 10-jet offer to Biman
- Airbus submits fresh 10-jet offer to Biman
- Airbus trims Biman proposal from 14 to 10 aircraft after Boeing deal
